seoTitle: Edgecombe vs Edi Upper — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest

ogTitle: Edgecombe vs Edi Upper: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Edgecombe and Edi Upper.
heading: Edgecombe vs Edi Upper — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Edgecombe, Victoria and Edi Upper, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Edi Upper has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Edgecombe (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Edgecombe or Edi Upper safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Edgecombe has a flood risk score of 42/100, while Edi Upper scores 44/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Edgecombe scores 43/100 for bushfire risk. Edi Upper scores 31/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Edgecombe or Edi Upper?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Edi Upper has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.22% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
